subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him. He giveth life and causeth death, then causeth death and giveth life. Verily He is the Ever-Living Who dieth not, in His grasp [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو یحیی و یمیت ثم یمیت و یحیی انه هو حی لایموت بیده
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @call to action, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
